---
title: "Teaching & Mentoring"
---

I am committed to training the next generation of ecologists, with a focus on quantitative methods and reproducible science.

## Courses Taught

### Graduate Level

-   **Species Distribution Modeling** (60h)
    -   *Role:* Teaching Assistant (2021-2023) / Instructor (2025)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Institution:* PPGE-UFRJ & PPGBIO-UNIRIO \[cite: 30, 31\]
-   **Open Science Practices** (30h)
    -   *Role:* Instructor (2025)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Institution:* PPGE-UFRJ \[cite: 32\]
-   **Geospatial Analysis Applied to Animal Biology** (45h)
    -   *Role:* Teaching Assistant (2020)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Institution:* PPGBA-UFRRJ \[cite: 38\]

### Undergraduate Level

-   \[cite_start\]**The Ecological Role of Marine Mammals** (UFRJ, 2024-2025) \[cite: 34\]
-   \[cite_start\]**Life Story and Evolution** (UERJ, 2022) \[cite: 36\]
-   \[cite_start\]**Biology of Marine Mammals** (FAMATH, 2013-2014) \[cite: 45\]

## Mentoring

### Current Students

-   **Danilo Simas** (M.Sc. Candidate, UFRJ, 2025-2027)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Project:* Marine climate refugia: an essential component for the conservation of coastal marine mammals\[cite: 48\].
-   **Danilo Simas** (Undergrad, UFRJ, 2023-2024)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Project:* Impacts of climate change on functional diversity in Cetacea in Brazil\[cite: 50\].
-   **Lara Rodrigues** (Undergrad, UFRJ, 2023-2024)
    -   \[cite_start\]*Project:* Blue corridor: the migration of humpback whales in coastal waters\[cite: 52\].
